cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Lily is interested in nature and American history. I need to figure out which option combines both of those elements. First, looking at the options: A) The Grand Canyon and Rodeo Drive. The Grand Canyon is mentioned as a place for hikers and nature lovers, so that's good for the nature part. Rodeo Drive is in Los Angeles and is about shopping, maybe seeing stars. But Rodeo Drive doesn't seem related to history or nature. So maybe this isn't the best choice. B) California and Los Angeles. California is a state, and Los Angeles is a city there. The text mentions Hollywood Walk of Fame and Rodeo Drive in LA.
